title: AI Governance & Risk Management
description: Resources for managing artificial intelligence risks, governance frameworks, and emerging AI regulations

resources.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF) Overview
resources.description: Plain-language overview of the NIST AI RMF 1.0 — Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage functions — with practical application examples.

resources.title: EU AI Act Readiness Checklist
resources.description: Structured checklist to assess your organization's readiness for the EU Artificial Intelligence Act, covering high-risk AI system requirements.

resources.title: AI Model Risk Management Policy Template
resources.description: Board-ready AI model risk management policy aligned with SR 11-7 guidance, covering validation, monitoring, and governance requirements.

resources.title: Generative AI Third-Party Risk Assessment
resources.description: Vendor due diligence questionnaire and risk assessment framework tailored to generative AI tools and large language model (LLM) providers.

resources.title: Enterprise AI Governance Program
resources.description: Comprehensive enterprise AI governance program covering AI ethics board charter, use-case review process, bias testing protocols, and incident response.
